metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_1461
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Localisation of NMDR subunits with immunogold EM.

8/9/2017 Pim
- Fig.4 show pre and postsynaptic localization in mossy fiber synapses.
- Based on the known transmembrane topology of the protein, the "integral component of ... membrane" term was chosen.. Experimental description: For postembedding immunogold cytochemistry, three adult male Wistar rats (150-250g, Scanbur, Sollentuna, Sweden) were deeply anesthetized with pentobarbital and fixed by transcardiac perfusion, with a mixture of 0.1% glutaraldehyde and 4% paraformaldehyde in phosphate buffer (pH 7.4; 50 mL/ min for 20 min), after a brief flush of 5% dextran (MW 70,000) in the same buffer.
